generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

instance MotorSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing motor status and control data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorData
]

instance SteeringServoSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing steering servo position and control data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringServoData
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectingFE, PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectingFE
]

instance MotorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectingFE
]

instance SteeringServoData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringServoSensor
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectingFE
]

instance ObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Tracked objects derived from LiDAR point cloud clustering"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslation
]

instance DrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Driving path data generated from object tracks and vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslation
]

instance DBSCANClustering : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustering model for object detection from raw LiDAR point clouds"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance KalmanFilter : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter model for tracking dynamic objects in ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for persistent structured data management and real-time access"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataCollectingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for collecting raw sensor data from physical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for processing LiDAR point clouds into object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslation : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for serializing data, aligning message types, and performing unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0SDK : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for embedded AI capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for inter-process communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for modeling and simulation of ACC algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing user interface for real-time vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks with data saving and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeOperationalData, SaveOperationalData, GenerateReport
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service offloading ACC computation (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation) to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedComputation, ActuationCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling operator control of ACC via enable/disable, speed setting, and emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data view for monitoring vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance SaveOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated saving of operational data to persistent storage"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GenerateReport : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated generation of operational reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicles for ACC system"
]

instance SpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Speed calculation based on distance to lead vehicle for ACC"
]

instance ActuationCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic actuation command for ACC system execution"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated enabling of Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated disabling of Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated setting of desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "User-initiated emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LowerChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lower chassis layer of 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle"
]

instance UpperChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Upper chassis layer of 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle"
]

instance AutonomyElements : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Autonomy elements of 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity deployed on separate hardware handling automotive functionality"
    base:contains LowerChassis, UpperChassis, AutonomyElements
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for 1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle system"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance VedderESCSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller (ESC) for precise steering and speed control"
]

instance LowerChassisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for lower chassis components"
    base:contains LowerChassis, VedderESCSpeedController
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity deployed on separate hardware"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity deployed on separate hardware"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization sub-component of User Entity implemented as ROS2 package"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel sub-component of User Entity implemented as ROS2 package"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for Physical Twin Entity"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance UserEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for User Entity"
    base:contains UserEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), motor actuation, and steering servo are generated by the Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE. The Data Translation component serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions for these control signals. Communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi using UDP."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, as mandated by standards but constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities implemented as ROS2 packages. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) is deployed on separate hardware, coordinating via 100 ms clock synchronization. The Physical Twin Entity handles resource-specific and general automotive functions like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking, while the Digital Twin Entity manages data processing and control mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "ROS2 protocol for intra-SW component communication; Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer for inter-entity communication. Network latency maintained at a maximum of 100 ms (Requirement R7) and clock synchronization required across all entities (Requirement R8)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) deployed on distinct hardware components; Data Storage implemented using an SQL database."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system complies with ISO 23247 standard, particularly Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin into Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities may implement OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection, device control, and information exchange to ensure interoperability."
]
